snippet.title: Seattle Storm at Indiana Fever
snippet.description: The Indiana Fever host the visiting Seattle Storm for a regular-season interconference WNBA game. The teams meet at Gainbridge Fieldhouse. Lexie Brown scored 17 points on May 10 to secure an interconference 89-82 Seattle win over Connecticut.

snippet.title: NASCAR All-Star Race
snippet.description: NASCAR Cup Series heads to Dover Motor Speedway for the annual All-Star Race. Top drivers compete for a $1 million prize in this non-points exhibition. The field includes 2025 and 2026 race winners looking to join the ranks of past event champions.

snippet.title: HOPE - Official Teaser - In Theaters Fall 2026
snippet.description: In the remote South Korea village of Hope Harbor, police chief Bum-seok (Hwang Jung- min) and officer Sung-ae (Hoyeon) are called to find a mysterious creature that has wreaked havoc on the village.  In the nearby forest, a coterie of hunters, including Sung- ki (Zo In-Sung) set out to track the beast and find themselves hunted instead. But all is not as it seems, and perceptions can be misleading. What begins as ignorance plants the seed of disaster, escalating through human conflict into a tragedy of cosmic proportions.

localized.title: HOPE - Official Teaser - In Theaters Fall 2026
localized.description: In the remote South Korea village of Hope Harbor, police chief Bum-seok (Hwang Jung- min) and officer Sung-ae (Hoyeon) are called to find a mysterious creature that has wreaked havoc on the village. But all is not as it seems, and perceptions can be misleading. What begins as ignorance plants the seed of disaster, escalating through human conflict into a tragedy of cosmic proportions.

snippet.title: PGA Championship - Final Round
snippet.description: The PGA Championship concludes with the final round at Aronimink Golf Club in Pennsylvania. The remaining field navigates the 7,394-yard, par-70 layout over the final 18 holes to secure a share of the $19 million tournament prize purse.

Lanterns Trailer https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kPkbV4TVQ3A&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczwCLH9RIm-7ui56ameRYmdQ&index=1&pp=iAQBsAgC

Emergency Awesome New Videos https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FeOfhzu7ZdY&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczxQXxyV_2D8kuEs_QsuQIyJ&index=7

The Boys Season 5 Episode 8 Finale Trailer Blood and Bone Breakdown and Easter Eggs. Butcher vs Homelander Ending, Kimiko's new Soldier Boy Powers, The Boys vs Homelander Ending. Soldier Boy Backstory and Vought Rising Prequel Series Setup, Homelander's Takeover plan for the world. More Prequels for The Boys coming after and the boys comic book ending changes. 

The Boys Gen V Season 2 Episode 8 Ending Aftermath, Marie New Powers, Sage Cameo Scene Explained. Sage Cipher vs Homelander. Cipher's Secret, Thomas Godolkin Powers Explained. Evil Professor X, X-Men References, Deadpool and Wolverine Cassandra Nova. More Powerful Than Homelander. Vought history, project Odessa explained. Gen V Season 2 Episode 5 Trailer.

President Homelander tries to become God Emperor Homelander. The Boys Season 4 Episode 8 Ending Aftermath, Disney Marvel and DC Justice League Easter Eggs and Jokes. Jensen Ackles Soldier Boy Returns, Ending Explained, The Boys Season 5 Teaser. Butcher's New Venom Compound V Powers. Homelander vs Ryan Endgame. The Boys Season 5 Final Season Teaser. Sage's True Master Plan

Sage Fantastic Four Reed Richards, Battle for the White House, Butcher and The Boys. The Boys Gen V Crossover Explained. Homelander, The Seven and Vought College for Superheroes. Marvel X-Men Easter Eggs and References. The show is designed to be more like X-Men with the school for super-powered compound v children. Fighting each other for a place on the seven team. Justice League and DC Movies References.

Lots more Marvel Trailers coming Avengers Doomsday Trailer, Avengers Secret Wars Trailer, Spider-Man Brand New Day Trailer! 

My Full video for The Boys Season 5 Episode 8 Finale video will post wed!

snippet.title: Turning Numbers Into Dreams
snippet.description: Ben and Erin help their friends open the first public retail space in the hotel, Scotsman Company. Tensions rise as money's tight with a big loan delayed, but a newly discovered space offers hope if they can agree on how to use it.

snippet.title: Trusting the Process
snippet.description: Catie invites her past flings to Josh's welcome party; Mido ghosts Debby when getting on his flight; Ashia's lawyer has bad news about Maxwell's visa; Shea hopes his life will meet Anabelle's standards; Marissa's sons worry about Edward moving in.

snippet.title: Roblox Car Obby But The Driver Is BLIND..
snippet.description:
Jump into NTE today using my link: https://pwgam.es/3RyOaQM #NTE​ #NevernesstoEverness

Today we had to comeplete an obby but the driver is BLIND. Make sure you watch the whole video to find out what happens.

Merch: https://foltyn.shop/

Join this channel to get access to perks:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCRkuUgtDAL4XSU5jB40J_wA/join

--Socials--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Roblox Group: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn
tags: roblox car obby but the driver is blind
foltyn and caylus playing steal a brainrot

localized.title: Roblox Car Obby But The Driver Is BLIND..
localized.description:
Jump into NTE today using my link: https://pwgam.es/3RyOaQM #NTE​ #NevernesstoEverness

Today we had to comeplete an obby but the driver is BLIND. Make sure you watch the whole video to find out what happens.

Merch: https://foltyn.shop/

Join this channel to get access to perks:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCRkuUgtDAL4XSU5jB40J_wA/join

--Socials--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Roblox Group: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

snippet.title: Jurassic Park
snippet.description: An entrepreneur invites scientists (Sam Neill, Laura Dern), a mathematics theorist (Jeff Goldblum) and others to his jungle theme-park featuring dinosaurs regenerated from DNA.
